creator: freebsd@dussan.org
text:
I got from poudriere for port fpc-fppkg-2.6.4_1:

===>  Building for fpc-fppkg-2.6.4_1
gmake[1]: Entering directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/fpc-fppkg/work/fpc-2.6.4/packages/fppkg'
/bin/mkdir -p units/x86_64-freebsd
/usr/local/bin/ppcx64 -Fl/usr/lib -Fu/usr/local/lib/fpc/2.6.4/units/x86_64-freebsd/rtl -Fu/usr/local/lib/fpc/2.6.4/units/x86_64-freebsd/hash -Fu/usr/local/lib/fpc/2.6.4/units/x86_64-freebsd/paszlib -Fu/usr/local/lib/fpc/2.6.4/units/x86_64-freebsd/fcl-process -Fu/usr/local/lib/fpc/2.6.4/units/x86_64-freebsd/fcl-base -Fu/usr/local/lib/fpc/2.6.4/units/x86_64-freebsd/iconvenc -Fu/usr/local/lib/fpc/2.6.4/units/x86_64-freebsd/fcl-xml -Fu/usr/local/lib/fpc/2.6.4/units/x86_64-freebsd/fcl-async -Fisrc -FE. -FUunits/x86_64-freebsd -Cg -CX -Ur -CX -dx86_64 src/fprepos.pp

Compiling src/fprepos.pp

Makefile:3136: recipe for target 'fprepos.ppu' failed
gmake[1]: *** [fprepos.ppu] Error 1

Bye!
Dušan
